titleStmt.title: SII 26.426: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 426. (A.R. No. 405 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: It records the sale of 455 kuḻi of land for a sum of 4(1/2) Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu by two persons named Bhāradvāji Nakkapirān Tiruppulipagavaṉ and Kāśyapan Tiruvaṇṇāmalai Kumārasvāmi of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaikkūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavardēvar of the same place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟkku yāṇṭu‘ṭu’ written below.6vatu malāṭaāna jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr bhāradvāji nakkapirān tiruppulippakavaṉum kāśyapan tiruvaṇṇāmalai kumārasvā- miyum Ivviruvom nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Āḷuṭaiyaār tiruppulippakavartevar koyilil Ātitāsa Āticaṇḍeśvaradevarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr vaṭakaḻaniyil nakkapirāṉ tiruppulipakavan kurāttu kālcey viṟpataṟku kiḻpā �tevatāṉam kurā ceykku meṟkum teṉpār
kkellai bhāradvāji naārāyaṇan śrī Araṅkanātaṉ muḷḷuvan kālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Ittevatāṉam kovaṇak kuṇṭilukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai tirucciṟṟampala vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta nāṟperellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi munnūṟṟu Eṇpatukkum Emmivicainta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu munṟe mukkālum kāśyapan tiruvaṇṇāmalai kumārasvāmi Uḷḷiṭṭār puṟakā tiruvaṇṇāmalai kumā viṟpataṟkku kiḻpā
rkkellai puṟakālukku meṟkun tenpārkkellai matirāntaka vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai melaippuṟakālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai nāṇaṟkāl velikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta nāṟperellai Uḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam patinaṟucāṇ kolāl kuḻi Eḻupattaiñcum viṟṟukkuṭuttukoḷḷa Uṭaiya Em milicainta vilaipporuḷ Anṟāṭu naṟkācu mukkāl Ikkācu mukkālum Āka kācu nālaraiyum Aṟakkoṇṭu Innilattukku veṭṭi muṭṭaiyā Iṟai Iṟukkakaṭavatallā tāṉamāka viṟṟuvilaiyāvaṇa
ñ ceytu kuṭuttom Ādidāsa Ādicaṇḍaśvaradevarkku Ivviruvom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai [§*]
Digital edition of SII 26.426 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
